persona: software engineer looking to adopt AI coding agents to improve productivity

modules.title: Introduction to Google Antigravity
modules.description: Understand what Antigravity is, how it compares to other AI coding tools, and set it up.

lessons.title: What is Antigravity? Google's Coding Agent Explained
lessons.why_curated: Fireship provides the best high-level overview of the Antigravity agent announced at I/O 2026.
lessons.concept_focus: High level overview of Antigravity capabilities
lessons.additive_value: Provides the essential framing for what the agent can and cannot do.

lessons.title: Antigravity vs Claude Code vs Codex
lessons.why_curated: It offers a direct comparison between Antigravity and its competitors to help you decide when to use which tool.
lessons.concept_focus: Comparative analysis of AI coding agents
lessons.additive_value: While Fireship gives the overview, this video gives practical use-case comparisons.

modules.title: Building Real Projects with Antigravity
modules.description: Learn how to use Antigravity for real-world software engineering tasks.

lessons.title: How Google Just Killed Half the AI Industry
lessons.why_curated: Showcases practical, hands-on examples of Antigravity disrupting traditional coding workflows.
lessons.additive_value: Transitions from theory to actual usage in an IDE environment.

scoutNotes: There are limited videos specifically focused on deep dives into Antigravity so far, so these 3 videos were curated to provide the foundational understanding and practical comparisons.
